_meta.purpose: Single source of truth for tunable numbers. Read-only MIRROR of the constants currently inline in index.html (extracted 2026-06-13 for the Balance Sim program, 2nd pilot). NOT yet wired in - index.html still uses its own inline constants. Wiring (mirror Cedar Hollow 167): a tools/sync_balance.js validates this + writes an inline <script id='balance-data'> block that index.html JSON.parses at boot (NO fetch, offline/Yandex-safe); add a sibling balance.schema.json (merge/strategy genre). Then the Balance Agent tunes here without touching game logic.
_meta.sourceRefs: AP_PER_TURN index.html:248; BASE_TIER_STATS :249; UPGRADES :274; getPlayerAP :1837; applyUpgradesToStats :1845; endlessLevelForWave :1723; spawn formula balance-notes.md sec 6

tierStats._note: Base hp/atk per unit tier (index 0 unused). Upgrades modify a per-level COPY of this.

combat._note: Attacker deals atk to defender; defender counter-deals atk to attacker simultaneously. Capture on defender death. No passive healing; merge to a new tier restores full hp.

spawn._note: Per-turn auto-spawn of T1 units on empty owned tiles.

upgrades._note: All one-shot booleans today (owned/not). The Depth Architect's planned restructure converts these to leveled + branching nodes. effect describes what each does so the game (and sim) can apply them data-drivenly.

starEconomy._note: Stars are the only meta currency. Finite supply vs a 73-star sink = economy dies once the tree is bought.

endless._note: Reuses the campaign level pool; no procedural generation. Same toolbox at higher waves.

lives._note: Energy/retention gate (uncommitted gf-lib system). A gate, not depth.

_depthTargets._note: Aspirational - what the Balance Agent tunes toward AFTER the Depth Architect adds structure. Cannot be hit by tuning the numbers above alone (see DEPTH-DIAGNOSIS.md).
_depthTargets.decisionDensity: most progression steps offer >1 meaningfully different affordable choice
_depthTargets.masteryHeadroom: a smart persona meaningfully outperforms a naive one
